tools.name: research
tools.description: Use when you need multi-step investigation, comparison across sources, or follow-up thread discovery. One call replaces 5-10 manual searches. Use single web searches for simple fact lookups.

topic.description: The topic to research. Any subject — science, technology, history, concepts, people, systems.

goal.description: Optional goal to focus the research toward a specific outcome.

tools.name: research_quick
tools.description: Fast surface-level scan on any topic. Single depth, fewer queries. Use for quick lookups before deciding to go deeper.

tools.name: research_brain_state
tools.description: Check the research brain's accumulated intelligence — level, calibration accuracy, session count, patterns learned, and recent learnings.

tools.name: research_share
tools.description: Generate a shareable markdown summary of research on a topic.

topic.description: Topic to produce a shareable research summary for.

tools.name: research_explain
tools.description: Explain research findings on a topic in a clear, accessible way.

tools.name: research_myself
tools.description: Ask the brain a meta-question about how to research better.

question.description: A question about the brain's research strategies, priors, or capabilities.

tools.name: research_import
tools.description: Import another instance's learnings into this brain.

brain_delta.description: Brain delta object containing learnings from another why-research instance.

tools.name: research_feedback
tools.description: Provide feedback on a specific finding to improve future research quality.

finding_id.description: ID of the finding to give feedback on.

query.description: The original query context for this finding.
